message:
fix: address round 3 review issues across 3 areas

- Pass rootDir to Agent constructor in agent-process.ts (sub-process
  agents couldn't resolve root tool scripts)
- Replace `git add .` with specific manifest path in initFromRoot
- Eliminate double root dir read in syncRoot by populating rootAgents
  from already-read specs instead of re-calling loadRoot()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
